subject: Three humanoid figures gathered in a scheming pose: a dark-haired female in red coat, a pale-haired figure, and a third in dark clothing
suspected_ip: Towa, Masked Saiyan, and/or Time Breaker figures (Dragon Ball Xenoverse)
description: Three humanoid figures are arranged in a conspiratorial grouping. The central and most prominent figure is a female-presenting humanoid wearing a striking red coat or jacket over a dark outfit, with dark hair. To her side stands a pale or light-haired figure in dark clothing. A third figure rounds out the group, also in darker tones. The background is a swirling dark energy field — blacks and purples — reinforcing a sense of plotting, conspiracy, or evil scheme. The mood is sinister and deliberate.
foreground: Three figures: red-coated female, pale-haired figure, third in dark clothing
background: Swirling dark energy field, black and purple
